testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify search functionality with a valid team name
steps: Verification: Expect search results to be displayed
expected: Search results are displayed for the team name

testCases.title: Verify search functionality with no input
steps: Verification: Expect all teams to be displayed
expected: All teams are displayed as there is no search input

testCases.title: Verify pagination link navigates to page 2
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=2'

testCases.title: Verify number of records displayed per page change to 50
steps: Verification: Expect 50 records displayed on page
